output.formatted:
Wembley Stadium

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?venueLabel WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q1050832 ; wdt:P1401 wd:Q162538 ; wdt:P277 ?venue .
  ?venue wdt:P276 wd:Q84 .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?venue rdfs:label ?venueLabel
    FILTER(lang(?venueLabel) = "en")
  }
}
LIMIT 1
```

Execution result:
Got no rows and 1 columns
